blocks.text: Primary invariant: Workspace does not decide policy. Workspace deterministically materializes the policy/native config bundle allowed by C7 Security into the task workdir.

items: Every task run has an isolated workdir tree. Two runs of the same task use separate `run_id` directories.
`WorkspacePrepared` is required before `Running`, but is not a `Claim` precondition.
Protected path decisions are owned by C7; Workspace implements resulting filesystem visibility and permissions.
Shared repo cache locks are short; wrapping an entire agent run in a repo lock violates this invariant.
